title: cachar #5503
definition:
1) to go around, go about, travel about in, go about in trade
    1a) (Qal)
        1a1) to go about to and fro (in business)
        1a2) trader, trafficker (participle)
    1b) (Pilpel) to palpitate
nasbUsage:
Definition: 1) to go around, go about, travel about in, go about in trade
    1a) (Qal)
        1a1) to go about to and fro (in business)
        1a2) trader, trafficker (participle)
    1b) (Pilpel) to palpitate

    NASB:  to go around or about, travel about
